channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran retaliates after Israel strikes Beirut and Tehran as war enters Day 7
item.description: Iran fired missiles toward Israel Friday, Israeli officials say, after Israel launched fresh strikes on Tehran and hit Beirut's southern suburbs overn...

item.title: Taking the heat. Sauna's popular and there may be health benefits too
item.description: It's an age old practice that's having a moment right now. But is there anything to the health claims? Scientists say sauna is more than hot air.

item.title: The Kalshi and Polymarket CEO feud: They hate each other
item.description: The 20-something billionaires who run Kalshi and Polymarket are battling it out to be the top prediction market company. Observers and former insiders...

item.title: Was that really Jim Carrey? The internet had thoughts but the quiz has answers
Homegoing service will celebrate civil rights leader Jesse Jackson in Chicago
item.description: Chicago native Jennifer Hudson is among the singers performing at a memorial for the civil rights leader who died last month. Former presidents Bill C...

item.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most An...

item.title: Attempted suicides, fights, pain: 911 calls reveal misery at ICE’s largest detention facility
item.description: The calls to 911 poured in from staff at Camp East Montana, the nation’s largest U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facility, in its f...

item.title: People love to hate changing clocks twice a year, but can’t agree how to fix it
Man charged in Utah killings wanted victims’ cars and money to get home, prosecutors allege
Landlords: Here’s How You Can Improve Your Existing Systems With Industry-Leading Tools
item.description: This article is presented by RentRedi. Most DIY landlords are more organized than they give themselves credit for. You likely have a spreadsheet for r...

item.title: Cluely CEO Roy Lee admits to publicly lying about revenue numbers last year
item.description: The $7 million in annual recurring revenue that Cluely CEO Roy Lee shared last summer was a lie, its founder and CEO Roy Lee admitted on Thursday on X...

item.title: Mid-Term Rentals Are Gaining Serious Traction—Here’s What You Need to Know
item.description: Real estate trends usually announce themselves loudly. There’s a new buzzword, a viral tweet, a flood of “this is the next big thing” posts. Monthly r...

item.title: AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare
item.description: AWS is launching Amazon Connect Health, an AI agent platform that will help with patient scheduling, documentation, and patient verification.

item.title: DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable
item.description: Instead of relying on expensive management consultants, the startup uses AI voice agents to conduct interviews with customers of the companies the PE ...

item.title: FBI investigating hack on its wiretap and surveillance systems: Report
item.description: Hackers allegedly broke into the FBI’s networks, according to a report by CNN.

item.title: The Best (and Worst) Housing Markets in America (March 2026 Update)
item.description: The housing market is split. Some real estate markets are seeing low inventory, rising prices, and fierce buyer competition. Others are seeing steep p...

item.title: How to Build a “Set-It-and-Forget-It” Real Estate Portfolio Without Owning Rentals
item.description: Rental investing isn’t passive. I know firsthand—I once owned 20+ rental properties. It takes a ton of work to buy them, stabilize them, and manage th...

item.title: How Out-of-Town Buyers Are Driving Rental Demand in 87 of the Top 100 Housing Markets
item.description: Out-of-town buyers are no longer a niche market. They are the market. Those who are old enough might remember their first pre-2008 investment seminar ...
